creator: bg1tpt@gmail.com
text:
File not found when run "make instance MOINTYPE=STANDALONE MOINDEST=xxx"

Fix: 1. change the MOINSCRIPT to wikiserver.py when defined MOINTYPE=STANDALONE, the old wiki.py is deprecated.
2. change the hint when making instances, add configuration for static contents.

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/www/moinmoin
make install clean
make instance MOINTYPE=STANDALONE MOINDEST=xxx
